name: Rockerbox
description: Rockerbox — Marketing attribution platform that centralizes ad spend data for multi-touch attribution reporting.

seo.title: Rockerbox — CRM / Lifecycle Automation
seo.meta_description: Rockerbox: Rockerbox — Marketing attribution platform that centralizes ad spend data for multi-touch attribution reporting.

when_to_use: Centralizing ad spend from all channels into one dashboard
Multi-touch attribution for a DTC brand replacing last-click
Marketing channel performance reporting for media buyers
Cross-channel ROAS analysis with Rockerbox attribution model
Connecting ad platforms to a unified attribution data layer

pros: Marketer-first attribution without heavy eng lift
Strong platform coverage: Meta, Google, TV, podcast
cons: Setup still takes weeks with clean data
Competes with Northbeam, Triple Whale for DTC
review.verdict: Strong mid-market attribution pick when Northbeam feels too DTC-focused and GA4 is too shallow.
review.best_for: Mid-market brands running diverse channel mix including offline
review.not_for: Small advertisers happy with native platform reports

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
